'''Crovna''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] that was home to the [[Peven Auction House]]; and [[Birtraub Brothers Storage and Reclamation Center]], located near the main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the planet, which was a front for the [[Birtraub Brothers]]' criminal activities.

{{Planet-stub}}
